scenario: Award Business to Lowest Bidder in Auction Process
description: Create an auction process, add suppliers, and award the business to the lowest bidder to verify that Coupa handles direct negotiations with suppliers correctly.

scenario: Direct Negotiation with Supplier in Auction Process
description: Create an auction process, add a supplier, and initiate direct negotiation to verify that Coupa handles direct negotiations with suppliers correctly.

scenario: Conduct RFx Event for Centre-Managed Commodities and Services
description: Create an RFx event for centre-managed commodities and services and verify that Coupa supports automated scoring and evaluation of supplier responses.
